title: Dyyz Nataz

'''Dyyz "Megadeath" Nataz''' was once a [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Ranger]] [[Police officer/Legends|officer]] who worked alongside a [[Diollan]] named [[Spurch Goa]]. He served with the Sector Rangers for several years, but his missions eventually led him into conflicts with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].

==Biography==
Before joining the [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Rangers]], Nataz was a ranking [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="DESB" />

The gangster [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] set into motion a chain of events that resulted in Dyzz being expelled from the Sector Rangers. In turn, he decided to lay low and relocated to the [[Corellian Sector (Nar Shaddaa)/Legends|Corellian Sector]] of the nearby [[Moon/Legends|moon]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. There, Spurch and he turned their military talents towards [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]].<ref name="DESB" />

Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a high-ranking officer of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] enlisted the bounty hunters' services to assassinate a corrupt Imperial spice inspector on Nar Shaddaa. They knew the target in question personally, and have brokered deals with him in the past. However, a contract was a contract. They cornered the inspector on [[Level 88]] and dropped him with several quick blaster shots.<ref name="Greedo's Tale">''[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]''</ref>

Another bounty hunter known as [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]] arrived in the Corellian Sector looking for Dyyz and Spurch. Jabba the Hutt had put out a contract on the two and wanted them eliminated. Gorm caught the bounty hunters dead in his sights, but as luck would have it, an eager young [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] named [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] fired a blaster shot into Gorm's back disabling him. Dyyz and Spurch were grateful to the enthusiastic mercenary and Spurch offered to train him in the art of bounty hunting.<ref name="Greedo's Tale" />

Dyyz later accompanied Spurch and Greedo to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to settle accounts with Jabba the Hutt.<ref name="Greedo's Tale" /> Shortly afterward, Dyyz left Tatooine on his own accord, hitching a ride with fellow hunters [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] and [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]], however, his activities since that time had not yet been revealed.

==Physical appearance==
Dyyz Nataz' true physical appearance is unknown. He wore an ancient set of brown, corroded, [[Ithullan]] armor, likely stolen from a museum, as the Ithullans were all but extinct by Dyyz' time.<ref name="Greedo's Tale" /> Accompanying the armor, was a large bell-shaped [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] helmet, coated with rust. The red photoreceptors placed within the helmet's visor gave Dyyz a fearsome countenance that intimidated anyone unlucky enough to fall before his path.

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Dyyz Nataz was created by comic book writer [[Tom Veitch]].
